name: No witnesses to my slip in Riverton, how prove it happened?
description: Medicals, report, photos, testimony; timely credible report suffices.[1]

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my slip in Riverton, how prove it happened?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medicals, report, photos, testimony; timely credible report suffices.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Use medical records, incident report, photos, your consistent testimony, work patterns.[9] Self-reported ok if credible.[1] Key factors: (1) Timely report; (2) Doctor notes mechanism; (3) Prior similar? Disclose; (4) Diagrams help.[9] File report detailing, get imaging. Solo claims succeed with documentation.
